ddls:
CREATE TABLE "controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the control */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the control was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the control belongs to */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the control is deprecated */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed documentation for the control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or annotations for the property */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  "is_bindable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is bindable */,
  "is_static_value" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is a static value */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the property belongs to */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is required */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* JSON field to store validation rules for the property */,
  "example_values" TEXT /* JSON field to store example values for the property */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the property */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type FOREIGN KEY ("property_type") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES controls ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property type is custom */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* JSON field to store changes made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_versions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
